name: Russia-Ukraine War
description: Documentary-style videos about the Russian-Ukrainian war

categories.infantry: soldiers in trenches, infantry combat, foot soldiers in military gear, troops running through smoke, men with assault rifles taking positions
categories.armor: tanks firing, armored personnel carriers, IFVs in combat, military vehicles in convoy, destroyed armored vehicles on battlefield
categories.artillery: artillery firing, howitzers, rocket launchers, HIMARS launching, Grad rocket systems, self-propelled guns shelling
categories.drones: FPV drone footage, drone strikes from above, military drones in flight, kamikaze drones, drone operator with controller, top-down drone view of battlefield
categories.aviation: fighter jets in flight, military helicopters, anti-aircraft missile launches, Patriot system firing, missiles intercepting in sky, jet aircraft on runway
categories.naval: warships at sea, naval combat, military boats, sea drones, harbor with battleships, missile strike on ship
categories.explosions: large explosions, smoke columns rising, buildings being destroyed, missile impacts, fires from strikes, aftermath of bombing
categories.general: military maps with arrows, soldiers with flags, command center briefing rooms, military convoys on roads, ruined city buildings, troops walking together, military leadership figures speaking
